Ship types and fleet management for EC4X

This module defines the different types of ships and their capabilities, including movement restrictions and combat abilities.

Imports

../common/types/units

Types

Ship = object
  shipType*: ShipType
  isCrippled*: bool
Individual ship with type and status

Procs

proc `$`(s: Ship): string {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
String representation of a ship 
proc canCarryTroops(ship: Ship): bool {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Check if a ship can transport ground forces 
proc canCrossRestrictedLane(ship: Ship): bool {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Check if a ship can traverse restricted jump lanes 
proc isCombatCapable(ship: Ship): bool {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Check if a ship can engage in combat 
proc militaryShip(crippled: bool = false): Ship {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
proc newShip(shipType: ShipType; isCrippled: bool = false): Ship {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Create a new ship of the specified type 
proc spaceliftShip(crippled: bool = false): Ship {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
